authority.exact_user_approval: I approve edits to plans/master.md sections Mission, Status, Decision Ledger, Architecture, Build Checklist, and Verification Checklist for the Level-8 consolidation.

conflict_inventory.before: Status delegated authority to untracked plans/status.md and plans/roadmap.md candidates.
conflict_inventory.after: Status uses committed evidence, requirements, the durable task graph, and logs; untracked candidates are explicitly non-authoritative.

conflict_inventory.before: Architecture described the shipped fixed README pipeline as the current target.
conflict_inventory.after: Architecture defines the canonical supervised facts-plan-verify-effect-reconcile production flow and token boundaries.
